# E2E Repo Skill Pack

This is a test skill pack from the repository's .eve/skill-packs directory.

## Usage

Use `/e2e-repo__hello` to verify this skill pack is available.

## Commands

### /hello

Responds with a greeting from the e2e-repo skill pack.

**Triggers**: `/e2e-repo__hello`, `/e2e-repo:hello`

**Instructions**:
Say "Hello from e2e-repo skill pack!" and include the text "skill-pack-check" with "repo_pack: e2e-repo" to verify the skill pack was loaded.
